findings.description: The knowledge file adds a 'デフォルト値' column to the configuration property table, but the source table has no such column. The source columns are: 設定項目, プロパティ名, データ型, 備考. While all values in the added column are empty (so no false information is introduced), the column structure itself has no basis in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source table columns: 設定項目 | プロパティ名 | データ型 | 備考 — no default value column exists.
